ruleTitle: Modularize the Ontology Around Stable Interface Boundaries
code:
import { EnterpriseOntology } from "@acme/ontology/all";

const term = EnterpriseOntology.anything.CustomerLifecycleState;
description: every service imports the whole enterprise ontology — every change to any unrelated term ripples through every consumer

ruleTitle: Modularize the Ontology Around Stable Interface Boundaries
description: service imports only the stable, versioned modules it depends on — change containment is structural, not aspirational

ruleTitle: Reuse Reference Ontologies Before Inventing Local Synonyms
description: local synonym invented without checking reusable reference vocabularies

ruleTitle: Reuse Reference Ontologies Before Inventing Local Synonyms
description: Gene Ontology term referenced via MIREOT-style import, with explicit local alias preserved for tooling

ruleTitle: Use the Weakest Formalism That Satisfies the Required Inference
description: business logic, constraints, and inference ad-hoc in code — no formal semantics, no validation gate, no reasoner check

ruleTitle: Use the Weakest Formalism That Satisfies the Required Inference
description: explicit OWL 2 profile chosen for the required inference, closed-world validation delegated to SHACL, code role bounded

ruleTitle: Make Cross-Ontology Mappings First-Class Artifacts
description: hidden semantic mapping embedded in service code — no review, no version, no confidence, no test

ruleTitle: Make Cross-Ontology Mappings First-Class Artifacts
description: mapping is an explicit, versioned, confidence-annotated, testable artefact with declared source and target

ruleTitle: Version Ontology Changes as Contract Migrations
description: silent semantic mutation — same IRI, redefined meaning, no migration, no deprecation, no provenance

ruleTitle: Version Ontology Changes as Contract Migrations
description: new version IRI, prior version explicitly deprecated, migration rule documented, provenance preserved

ruleTitle: Govern Shared Ontologies With Collaborative Editorial Workflow
description: developer-local semantic authority — no domain expert, no review, no decision record

ruleTitle: Govern Shared Ontologies With Collaborative Editorial Workflow
description: proposal references the affected terms and CQs, names the required reviewers, and produces a decision record

ruleTitle: Measure Ontology Value by Operational Use, Not Aesthetic Completeness
code: const ontologyScore = ontology.terms.length;
description: vanity metric — counts terms, not whether anyone can use them

ruleTitle: Measure Ontology Value by Operational Use, Not Aesthetic Completeness
description: portfolio of operational outcomes the ontology is supposed to enable, each tied to a downstream consumer

ruleTitle: Start Shared Ontologies From Competency Questions, Not Term Lists
code:
export const ontologyTerms = [
  "Customer",
  "Account",
  "Identity",
  "Entitlement",
  "Segment"
] as const;
description: a vocabulary dump — no user, no task, no query, no verification target

ruleTitle: Start Shared Ontologies From Competency Questions, Not Term Lists
description: competency questions, scope, and intended consumers fix the verification target up front

ruleTitle: Treat the Shared Ontology as a Semantic Contract, Not a Naming Convention
description: same label, different semantics across services — no commitment, no contract

ruleTitle: Treat the Shared Ontology as a Semantic Contract, Not a Naming Convention
description: each term carries IRI, label, definition, and a broader-than relation — a commitment downstream consumers can reason about

ruleTitle: Validate Ontologies With Tests, Reasoners, Shapes, and Pitfall Scanners
description: ontology package ships without semantic or data-conformance tests — no reasoner, no shapes, no pitfall scan

ruleTitle: Validate Ontologies With Tests, Reasoners, Shapes, and Pitfall Scanners
code:
export const ontologyReleaseChecks = [
  "reasoner:consistent-classes",
  "reasoner:no-unsatisfiable-classes",
  "cq:all-competency-questions-answerable",
  "shacl:all-production-sample-data-valid",
  "pitfalls:oops-critical-zero"
] as const;
description: release gate enumerates the reasoner, CQ, SHACL, and pitfall-scanner checks that must pass before publish
